\ottprodline{|}{\ottnt{pat}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\beta}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottnt{ce}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottnt{se}}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{M}{}{}{}{}\ottprodnewline
\ottprodline{|}{\ottnt{formula}}{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ottgrammar}{\ottgrammartabular{
\ottterminals\ottinterrule
\ottA\ottinterrule
\otteff\ottinterrule
\ottF\ottinterrule
\ottG\ottinterrule
\ottS\ottinterrule
\ottprim\ottinterrule
\otte\ottinterrule
\ottprog\ottinterrule
\otttau\ottinterrule
\ottchi\ottinterrule
\ottpat\ottinterrule
\ottbinds\ottinterrule
\ottce\ottinterrule
\ottse\ottinterrule
\ottmbranches\ottinterrule
\ottformula\ottinterrule
\ottJtype\ottinterrule
\ottJcore\ottinterrule
\ottJassert\ottinterrule
\ottJmatch\ottinterrule
\ottjudgement\ottinterrule
\ottuserXXsyntax\ottafterlastrule
}}

% defnss
% defns Jtype
%% defn subeff
\newcommand{\ottdruleSubXXpureXXpure}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \mathbf{0}   \leq   \mathbf{0}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Sub\_pure\_pure}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSubXXpureXXimpure}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \mathbf{0}   \leq   \mathbf{1}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Sub\_pure\_impure}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSubXXimpureXXimpure}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
  \mathbf{1}   \leq   \mathbf{1}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Sub\_impure\_impure}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnsubeff}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \epsilon  \leq  \epsilon' $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSubXXpureXXpure{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSubXXpureXXimpure{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSubXXimpureXXimpure{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn prim_type
\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXadd}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Add}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{(}  \ottkw{int}  \ottsym{,}  \ottkw{int}  \ottsym{)}  \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottkw{int} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_add}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXsub}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Sub}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{(}  \ottkw{int}  \ottsym{,}  \ottkw{int}  \ottsym{)}  \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottkw{int} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_sub}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXmul}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Mul}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{(}  \ottkw{int}  \ottsym{,}  \ottkw{int}  \ottsym{)}  \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottkw{int} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_mul}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXdiv}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Div}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{(}  \ottkw{int}  \ottsym{,}  \ottkw{int}  \ottsym{)}  \to_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottkw{int} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_div}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXand}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{And}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{(}  \ottkw{bool}  \ottsym{,}  \ottkw{bool}  \ottsym{)}  \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottkw{bool} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_and}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXor}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Or}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{(}  \ottkw{bool}  \ottsym{,}  \ottkw{bool}  \ottsym{)}  \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottkw{bool} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_or}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXnot}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Not}  \mathord{:}  \ottkw{bool}  \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottkw{bool} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_not}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXnew}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{New} \, \ottsym{[}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{]}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{A}  \to_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottkw{ptr} \, \ottnt{A} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_new}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXdel}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Del} \, \ottsym{[}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{]}  \mathord{:}  \ottkw{ptr} \, \ottnt{A}  \to_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottsym{(}  \,  \ottsym{)} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_del}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXget}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Get} \, \ottsym{[}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{]}  \mathord{:}  \ottkw{ptr} \, \ottnt{A}  \to_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottnt{A} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_get}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdrulePTXXset}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottkw{Set} \, \ottsym{[}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{]}  \mathord{:}  \ottsym{(}  \ottkw{ptr} \, \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{)}  \to_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottsym{(}  \,  \ottsym{)} }{%
{\ottdrulename{PT\_set}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnprimXXtype}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \ottnt{prim}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{A}  \to_{ \epsilon }  \ottnt{B} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXadd{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXsub{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXmul{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXdiv{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXand{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXor{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXnot{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXnew{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXdel{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXget{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdrulePTXXset{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn synth
\newcommand{\ottdruleSynXXint}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottmv{lit}  \Rightarrow  \ottkw{int} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Syn\_int}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSynXXbool}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottmv{blit}  \Rightarrow  \ottkw{bool} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Syn\_bool}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSynXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{A}  \in  \Gamma }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottmv{x}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{A} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Syn\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSynXXannot}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottnt{e}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{A} }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottnt{e}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{[}  \epsilon  \ottsym{]}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{A} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Syn\_annot}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSynXXapp}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottnt{prim}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{A}  \to_{ \epsilon }  \ottnt{B}  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{e}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{A} }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottnt{prim} \, \ottnt{e}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{B} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Syn\_app}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSynXXcall}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{f}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{F}  \in  \Sigma  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{e}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{A} }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottmv{f} \, \ottnt{e}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{B} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Syn\_call}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnsynth}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottnt{e}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{A} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSynXXint{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSynXXbool{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSynXXvar{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSynXXannot{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSynXXapp{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSynXXcall{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn check
\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXlet}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon' }  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{A}  \quad  \epsilon'  \leq  \epsilon  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A}  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{B} }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottkw{let} \, \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{B} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_let}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXtuple}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \quad .. \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottnt{e_{\ottmv{n}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}} }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{e_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{)}  \Leftarrow  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{)} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_tuple}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXlettuple}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon' }  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{)}  \quad  \epsilon'  \leq  \epsilon  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma'  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{C} }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottkw{let} \, \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{x_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{x_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{C} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_lettuple}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXinject}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{L}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{A}  \in  \ottnt{B}  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottnt{e}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{A} }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottmv{L} \, \ottnt{e}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{B} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_inject}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXcase}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon' }  \ottnt{e}  \Rightarrow  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{\}}  \quad  \epsilon'  \leq  \epsilon  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{x_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{C}  \quad .. \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{x_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A_{\ottmv{n}}}  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottnt{e_{\ottmv{n}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{C} }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottkw{case} \, \ottnt{e}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \ottmv{x_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rightarrow  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}} \, \ottmv{x_{\ottmv{n}}}  \rightarrow  \ottnt{e_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{\}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{C} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_case}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXiter}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon' }  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{A}  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A}  \vdash_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{Next}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{Done}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{B}  \ottsym{\}}  \quad   \mathbf{1}   \leq  \epsilon }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottkw{iter} \, \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ottsym{\}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{B} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_iter}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXif}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottkw{bool}  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{A}  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{3}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{A} }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottkw{if} \, \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \ottkw{then} \, \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{2}}}} \, \ottkw{else} \, \ottnt{e_{{\mathrm{3}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{A} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_if}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleChkXXsub}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon' }  \ottnt{e}  \Rightarrow  \ottnt{A}  \quad  \epsilon'  \leq  \epsilon }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottnt{e}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{A} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Chk\_sub}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefncheck}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{ \epsilon }  \ottnt{e}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{A} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXlet{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXtuple{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXlettuple{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXinject{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXcase{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXiter{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXif{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleChkXXsub{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn prog
\newcommand{\ottdruleProgXXmain}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottnt{e}  \Leftarrow  \ottsym{(}  \,  \ottsym{)} }%
}{
 \Sigma  \vdash   \mathsf{main} =  \ottnt{e}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Prog\_main}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleProgXXpurefun}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A}  \vdash_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{e}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{B}  \quad  \Sigma  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{f}  \ottsym{:}   \ottnt{A}  \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{B}   \vdash  \ottnt{prog} }%
}{
 \Sigma  \vdash   \mathsf{fun}\; \ottmv{f}  (  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{A}  ) \to_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{B}  \; \{  \ottnt{e}  \} \quad  \ottnt{prog}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Prog\_purefun}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleProgXXimpurefun}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{f}  \ottsym{:}   \ottnt{A}  \to_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottnt{B}   ;  \Gamma  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{:}  \ottnt{A}  \vdash_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottnt{e}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{B}  \quad  \Sigma  \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{f}  \ottsym{:}   \ottnt{A}  \to_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottnt{B}   \vdash  \ottnt{prog} }%
}{
 \Sigma  \vdash   \mathsf{fun}\; \ottmv{f}  (  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \ottnt{A}  ) \to_{  \mathbf{1}  }  \ottnt{B}  \; \{  \ottnt{e}  \} \quad  \ottnt{prog}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Prog\_impurefun}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleProgXXspecfun}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ M  = \overline{ pat \mathord{:}  \tau , \cdot \to [\cdot] \, se }  \quad   \Sigma , \mathsf{spec}\;  \ottmv{f}  :  \tau  \to  \tau'   ;  \Gamma  \vdash  M  \Leftarrow  \tau'  \quad   \Sigma , \mathsf{spec}\;  \ottmv{f}  :  \tau  \to  \tau'   \vdash  \ottnt{prog} }%
}{
 \Sigma  \vdash  \ottkw{spec} \, \ottmv{f}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \rightarrow  \tau'  \ottsym{=}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottnt{pat_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rightarrow  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottnt{pat_{\ottmv{n}}}  \rightarrow  \ottnt{se_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{\}}  \ottnt{prog} }{%
{\ottdrulename{Prog\_specfun}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleProgXXspecdef}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \tau  \quad   \Sigma , \mathsf{spec}\;  \ottmv{f}  :  \tau   \vdash  \ottnt{prog} }%
}{
 \Sigma  \vdash   \mathsf{spec}\; \ottmv{f}  :  \tau  =  \ottnt{se}  \quad  \ottnt{prog}  }{%
{\ottdrulename{Prog\_specdef}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnprog}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma  \vdash  \ottnt{prog} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleProgXXmain{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleProgXXpurefun{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleProgXXimpurefun{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleProgXXspecfun{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleProgXXspecdef{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsJtype}{
\ottdefnsubeff{}\ottdefnprimXXtype{}\ottdefnsynth{}\ottdefncheck{}\ottdefnprog{}}

% defns Jcore
%% defn ctor_lookup
\newcommand{\ottdruleCtorXXlookup}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\ottkw{sort} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{i}}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma \quad  \ottmv{L}  \mathord{:}  \tau'  \in \mathrm{ctors}( \ottmv{D} ) \in  \Sigma  \quad \tau  \ottsym{=} \, \ottkw{subst} \, \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{i}}} \, \ottkw{in} \, \tau'}%
}{
\ottmv{L}  \ottsym{:}  \tau \, \ottkw{in} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma}{%
{\ottdrulename{Ctor\_lookup}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnctorXXlookup}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$\ottmv{L}  \ottsym{:}  \tau \, \ottkw{in} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma$}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCtorXXlookup{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn core_branch
\newcommand{\ottdruleCoreBrXXcheck}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\ottmv{L}  \ottsym{:}  \tau'' \, \ottkw{in} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma \quad  \Sigma  ;   \Gamma , \mathsf{spec}\;  \ottmv{x}  :  \tau''   \vdash  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash (  \ottmv{L}  \;  \ottmv{x}  ) \mathbin{:}  \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)}  \to  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{CoreBr\_check}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefncoreXXbranch}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash (  \ottmv{L}  \;  \ottmv{x}  ) \mathbin{:}  \tau'  \to  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCoreBrXXcheck{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn core_synth
\newcommand{\ottdruleCoreSynXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \mathsf{spec}\;  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \tau  \in  \Gamma }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottmv{x}  \Rightarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{CoreSyn\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCoreSynXXeq}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \tau  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \doteq  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \Rightarrow  \ottkw{bool} }{%
{\ottdrulename{CoreSyn\_eq}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCoreSynXXand}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottkw{bool}  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottkw{bool} }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \wedge  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \Rightarrow  \ottkw{bool} }{%
{\ottdrulename{CoreSyn\_and}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCoreSynXXnot}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \ottkw{bool} }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \neg  \ottnt{ce}   \Rightarrow  \ottkw{bool} }{%
{\ottdrulename{CoreSyn\_not}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCoreSynXXown}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \mathsf{Own}_{ \tau }   \Rightarrow  \ottkw{pred} \, \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{CoreSyn\_own}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCoreSynXXcall}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \mathsf{spec}\;  \ottmv{f}  \mathord{:}   \tau  \to  \tau'   \in  \Sigma  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottmv{f} \, \ottnt{ce}  \Rightarrow  \tau' }{%
{\ottdrulename{CoreSyn\_call}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCoreSynXXconst}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \mathsf{spec}\;  \ottmv{f}  \mathord{:}  \tau  \in  \Sigma }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottmv{f}  \Rightarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{CoreSyn\_const}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCoreSynXXannot}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \Rightarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{CoreSyn\_annot}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefncoreXXsynth}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce}  \Rightarrow  \tau $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCoreSynXXvar{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCoreSynXXeq{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCoreSynXXand{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCoreSynXXnot{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCoreSynXXown{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCoreSynXXcall{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCoreSynXXconst{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCoreSynXXannot{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn core_check
\newcommand{\ottdruleCoreChkXXreturn}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottkw{return} \, \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \ottkw{pred} \, \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{CoreChk\_return}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCoreChkXXtake}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \ottkw{pred} \, \tau  \quad  \Sigma  ;   \Gamma , \mathsf{spec}\;  \ottmv{x}  :  \tau   \vdash  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottkw{pred} \, \tau' }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottkw{take} \, \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottkw{pred} \, \tau' }{%
{\ottdrulename{CoreChk\_take}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCoreChkXXlet}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \tau  \quad  \Sigma  ;   \Gamma , \mathsf{spec}\;  \ottmv{x}  :  \tau   \vdash  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau' }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottkw{let} \, \ottmv{x}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau' }{%
{\ottdrulename{CoreChk\_let}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCoreChkXXcon}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\ottmv{L}  \ottsym{:}  \tau \, \ottkw{in} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottmv{L} \, \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} }{%
{\ottdrulename{CoreChk\_con}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCoreChkXXtuple}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \quad .. \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce_{\ottmv{n}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau_{\ottmv{n}} }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{ce_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{)}  \Leftarrow  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{)} }{%
{\ottdrulename{CoreChk\_tuple}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCoreChkXXlettuple}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{)}  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma'  \vdash  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau' }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottkw{let} \, \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{x_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{x_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau' }{%
{\ottdrulename{CoreChk\_lettuple}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCoreChkXXcase}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce}  \Rightarrow  \tau'  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash (  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \;  \ottmv{x_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  ) \mathbin{:}  \tau'  \to  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau  \quad .. \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash (  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \;  \ottmv{x_{\ottmv{n}}}  ) \mathbin{:}  \tau'  \to  \ottnt{ce_{\ottmv{n}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottkw{case} \, \ottnt{ce} \, \ottkw{of} \, \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \ottmv{x_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rightarrow  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}} \, \ottmv{x_{\ottmv{n}}}  \rightarrow  \ottnt{ce_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{\}}  \Leftarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{CoreChk\_case}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCoreChkXXif}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottkw{bool}  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{3}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottkw{if} \, \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \ottkw{then} \, \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{2}}}} \, \ottkw{else} \, \ottnt{ce_{{\mathrm{3}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{CoreChk\_if}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCoreChkXXsub}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce}  \Rightarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{CoreChk\_sub}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefncoreXXcheck}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{ce}  \Leftarrow  \tau $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCoreChkXXreturn{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCoreChkXXtake{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCoreChkXXlet{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCoreChkXXcon{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCoreChkXXtuple{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCoreChkXXlettuple{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCoreChkXXcase{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCoreChkXXif{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCoreChkXXsub{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsJcore}{
\ottdefnctorXXlookup{}\ottdefncoreXXbranch{}\ottdefncoreXXsynth{}\ottdefncoreXXcheck{}}

% defns Jassert
%% defn spec_synth
\newcommand{\ottdruleSpecSynXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \mathsf{spec}\;  \ottmv{x}  \mathord{:}  \tau  \in  \Gamma }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottmv{x}  \Rightarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{SpecSyn\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSpecSynXXeq}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \tau  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \doteq  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \Rightarrow  \ottkw{bool} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SpecSyn\_eq}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSpecSynXXand}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottkw{bool}  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottkw{bool} }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \wedge  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \Rightarrow  \ottkw{bool} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SpecSyn\_and}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSpecSynXXnot}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \ottkw{bool} }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \neg  \ottnt{se}   \Rightarrow  \ottkw{bool} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SpecSyn\_not}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSpecSynXXcall}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \mathsf{spec}\;  \ottmv{f}  \mathord{:}   \tau  \to  \tau'   \in  \Sigma  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottmv{f} \, \ottnt{se}  \Rightarrow  \tau' }{%
{\ottdrulename{SpecSyn\_call}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSpecSynXXconst}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \mathsf{spec}\;  \ottmv{f}  \mathord{:}  \tau  \in  \Sigma }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottmv{f}  \Rightarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{SpecSyn\_const}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSpecSynXXannot}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \Rightarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{SpecSyn\_annot}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnspecXXsynth}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se}  \Rightarrow  \tau $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSpecSynXXvar{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSpecSynXXeq{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSpecSynXXand{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSpecSynXXnot{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSpecSynXXcall{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSpecSynXXconst{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSpecSynXXannot{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn spec_check
\newcommand{\ottdruleSpecChkXXreturn}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottkw{return} \, \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \ottkw{pred} \, \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{SpecChk\_return}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSpecChkXXtake}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \ottkw{pred} \, \tau  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \ottnt{pat}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \to [   \cdot   ] \,  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \Leftarrow  \ottkw{pred} \, \tau' }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottkw{take} \, \ottnt{pat}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottkw{pred} \, \tau' }{%
{\ottdrulename{SpecChk\_take}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSpecChkXXlet}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Rightarrow  \tau  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \ottnt{pat}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \to [   \cdot   ] \,  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \Leftarrow  \tau' }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottkw{let} \, \ottnt{pat}  \ottsym{=}  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{;}  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau' }{%
{\ottdrulename{SpecChk\_let}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSpecChkXXtuple}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \quad .. \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se_{\ottmv{n}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau_{\ottmv{n}} }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{se_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{)}  \Leftarrow  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{)} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SpecChk\_tuple}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSpecChkXXinject}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{\ottmv{L}  \ottsym{:}  \tau \, \ottkw{in} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottmv{L} \, \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} }{%
{\ottdrulename{SpecChk\_inject}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSpecChkXXcase}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se}  \Rightarrow  \tau'  \quad  M  = \overline{ pat \mathord{:}  \tau' , \cdot \to [\cdot] \, se }  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  M  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottkw{case} \, \ottnt{se} \, \ottkw{of} \, \ottsym{\{}  \ottnt{pat_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \rightarrow  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottnt{pat_{\ottmv{n}}}  \rightarrow  \ottnt{se_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{\}}  \Leftarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{SpecChk\_case}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSpecChkXXif}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \Leftarrow  \ottkw{bool}  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{3}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottkw{if} \, \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \ottkw{then} \, \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{2}}}} \, \ottkw{else} \, \ottnt{se_{{\mathrm{3}}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{SpecChk\_if}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSpecChkXXcomp}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash_{  \mathbf{0}  }  \ottnt{e}  \Leftarrow  \ottnt{A} }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \underline{ \ottnt{e} }   \Leftarrow   \underline{ \ottnt{A} }  }{%
{\ottdrulename{SpecChk\_comp}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSpecChkXXsub}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se}  \Rightarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{SpecChk\_sub}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnspecXXcheck}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \tau $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSpecChkXXreturn{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSpecChkXXtake{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSpecChkXXlet{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSpecChkXXtuple{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSpecChkXXinject{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSpecChkXXcase{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSpecChkXXif{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSpecChkXXcomp{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSpecChkXXsub{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsJassert}{
\ottdefnspecXXsynth{}\ottdefnspecXXcheck{}}

% defns Jmatch
%% defn has_con
\newcommand{\ottdruleHCXXhere}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottmv{L} \, \ottnt{pat}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \;\mathsf{has\_con} }{%
{\ottdrulename{HC\_here}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleHCXXthere}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ M  \;\mathsf{has\_con} }%
}{
 \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \;\mathsf{has\_con} }{%
{\ottdrulename{HC\_there}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnhasXXcon}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ M  \;\mathsf{has\_con} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleHCXXhere{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleHCXXthere{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn has_tup
\newcommand{\ottdruleHTXXhere}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \ottsym{(}  \ottnt{pat_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{pat_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \;\mathsf{has\_tup} }{%
{\ottdrulename{HT\_here}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleHTXXthere}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ M  \;\mathsf{has\_tup} }%
}{
 \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \;\mathsf{has\_tup} }{%
{\ottdrulename{HT\_there}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnhasXXtup}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ M  \;\mathsf{has\_tup} $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleHTXXhere{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleHTXXthere{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn strip_var
\newcommand{\ottdruleSVXXempty}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \cdot   \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{var}  \leadsto   \cdot }{%
{\ottdrulename{SV\_empty}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSVXXcons}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{var}  \leadsto  M'}%
}{
\ottmv{x}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{var}  \leadsto  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}   \Gamma , \mathsf{spec}\;  \ottmv{x}  :  \tau   \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M'}{%
{\ottdrulename{SV\_cons}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnstripXXvar}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{var}  \leadsto  M'$}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSVXXempty{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSVXXcons{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn spec_con
\newcommand{\ottdruleSCXXempty}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \cdot   \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{L}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \leadsto   \cdot }{%
{\ottdrulename{SC\_empty}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSCXXmatch}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{L}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \leadsto  M'}%
}{
\ottmv{L} \, \ottnt{pat}  \ottsym{:}  \tau'  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{L}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \leadsto  \ottnt{pat}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M'}{%
{\ottdrulename{SC\_match}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSCXXskip}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \ottmv{L}  \neq  \ottmv{L'}  \quad M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{L}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \leadsto  M'}%
}{
\ottmv{L'} \, \ottnt{pat}  \ottsym{:}  \tau'  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{L}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \leadsto  M'}{%
{\ottdrulename{SC\_skip}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleSCXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{L}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \leadsto  M'}%
}{
\ottmv{x}  \ottsym{:}  \tau'  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{L}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \leadsto  \ottmv{y}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}   \Gamma , \mathsf{spec}\;  \ottmv{x}  :  \tau'   \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M'}{%
{\ottdrulename{SC\_var}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnspecXXcon}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{L}  \ottsym{:}  \tau  \leadsto  M'$}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSCXXempty{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSCXXmatch{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSCXXskip{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleSCXXvar{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn expand_tup
\newcommand{\ottdruleETXXempty}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
}{
 \cdot   \ottsym{/} \, \ottkw{tup} \, \leadsto   \cdot }{%
{\ottdrulename{ET\_empty}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleETXXtuple}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{M  \ottsym{/} \, \ottkw{tup} \, \leadsto  M'}%
}{
\ottsym{(}  \ottnt{pat_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{pat_{\ottmv{k}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{:}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{k}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \ottsym{/} \, \ottkw{tup} \, \leadsto  \ottnt{pat_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottnt{pat_{\ottmv{k}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{\ottmv{k}}  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M'}{%
{\ottdrulename{ET\_tuple}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleETXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{M  \ottsym{/} \, \ottkw{tup} \, \leadsto  M'}%
}{
\ottmv{x}  \ottsym{:}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{k}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \ottsym{/} \, \ottkw{tup} \, \leadsto  \ottmv{y_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{y_{\ottmv{k}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau_{\ottmv{k}}  \ottsym{,}  \beta  \to  \ottsym{[}   \Gamma , \mathsf{spec}\;  \ottmv{x}  :  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{k}}  \ottsym{)}   \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M'}{%
{\ottdrulename{ET\_var}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefnexpandXXtup}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$M  \ottsym{/} \, \ottkw{tup} \, \leadsto  M'$}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleETXXempty{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleETXXtuple{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleETXXvar{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}

%% defn coverage
\newcommand{\ottdruleCovXXdone}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \ottsym{,}  \Gamma'  \vdash  \ottnt{se}  \Leftarrow  \tau  \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  M  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash   \cdot   \to  \ottsym{[}  \Gamma'  \ottsym{]}  \ottnt{se}  \mid  M  \Leftarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{Cov\_done}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCovXXvar}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{var}  \leadsto  M'}%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  M'  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  M  \Leftarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{Cov\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCovXXcon}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ M  \;\mathsf{has\_con} }%
\ottpremise{\ottkw{sort} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \ottmv{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \ottmv{a_{\ottmv{k}}}  \ottsym{)}  \ottsym{=}  \ottsym{\{}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau'_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}} \, .. \, \ottsym{\mbox{$\mid$}}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau'_{\ottmv{n}}  \ottsym{\}} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma}%
\ottpremise{\ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau''_{{\mathrm{1}}} \, \ottkw{in} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma \quad .. \quad \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau''_{\ottmv{n}} \, \ottkw{in} \, \ottmv{D}  \ottsym{(}  \tau_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \ottsym{,} \, .. \, \ottsym{,}  \tau_{\ottmv{i}}  \ottsym{)} \, \ottkw{in} \, \Sigma}%
\ottpremise{M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{L_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau''_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \leadsto  M_{{\mathrm{1}}} \quad .. \quad M  \ottsym{/}  \ottmv{L_{\ottmv{n}}}  \ottsym{:}  \tau''_{\ottmv{n}}  \leadsto  M_{\ottmv{n}}}%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  M_{{\mathrm{1}}}  \Leftarrow  \tau  \quad .. \quad  \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  M_{\ottmv{n}}  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  M  \Leftarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{Cov\_con}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\ottdruleCovXXtup}[1]{\ottdrule[#1]{%
\ottpremise{ M  \;\mathsf{has\_tup} }%
\ottpremise{M  \ottsym{/} \, \ottkw{tup} \, \leadsto  M'}%
\ottpremise{ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  M'  \Leftarrow  \tau }%
}{
 \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  M  \Leftarrow  \tau }{%
{\ottdrulename{Cov\_tup}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\ottdefncoverage}[1]{\begin{ottdefnblock}[#1]{$ \Sigma  ;  \Gamma  \vdash  M  \Leftarrow  \tau $}{}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCovXXdone{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCovXXvar{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCovXXcon{}}
\ottusedrule{\ottdruleCovXXtup{}}
\end{ottdefnblock}}


\newcommand{\ottdefnsJmatch}{
\ottdefnhasXXcon{}\ottdefnhasXXtup{}\ottdefnstripXXvar{}\ottdefnspecXXcon{}\ottdefnexpandXXtup{}\ottdefncoverage{}}

\ottdefnsJtype
\ottdefnsJcore
\ottdefnsJassert
\ottdefnsJmatch
